items.raw_excerpt: Vermont is home to more than 45 cheesemakers and produces some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, one of the state’s most historic brands got a chance to continue its legacy by teaming up with another to bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_en: Vermont has more than 45 cheesemakers and is known for some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, historic Grafton Village Cheese teamed up with another brand to keep its legacy going and bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_ko: 버몬트에는 45곳이 넘는 치즈 제조업체가 있으며, 미국에서도 손꼽히는 치즈 생산지로 알려져 있습니다. 약 1년 전, 오랜 역사를 지닌 그래프턴 빌리지 치즈는 다른 브랜드와 손잡고 전통을 이어 가며 치즈의 미래를 준비하게 됐습니다.
items.title_en: Grafton Village Cheese Looks to the Future
items.title_ko: 그래프턴 빌리지 치즈, 전통을 이어 미래로
items.title_original: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese - WCAX

items.raw_excerpt: Shops, eateries and more line the streets of Stockholm, a quaint village along Lake Pepin. This photo was taken in early October.
items.summary_en: Stockholm is a small village by Lake Pepin in Wisconsin. Its streets have shops and places to eat, and the photo was taken in early October.
items.summary_ko: 스톡홀름은 위스콘신의 레이크 페핀 옆에 있는 작은 마을입니다. 거리에는 가게와 식당들이 이어져 있고, 사진은 10월 초에 찍혔습니다.
items.title_en: A quiet visit to Stockholm, Wisconsin
items.title_ko: 위스콘신 스톡홀름의 조용한 거리
items.title_original: MN Prairie Roots: One final visit to Stockholm — Wisconsin, not Sweden. - MinnPost

items.raw_excerpt: The windows of the Mauricie Islamic Cultural Centre were smashed in an act of vandalism early Wednesday morning in Trois-Rivières, Que.
items.summary_en: Windows at the Mauricie Islamic Cultural Centre were smashed early Wednesday in Trois-Rivières, Quebec. The vandalism left people worried and hurt.
items.summary_ko: 수요일 이른 아침 퀘벡주 트루아리비에르의 모리시 이슬람 문화 센터 창문이 깨졌다. 이 기물 파손으로 사람들이 걱정하고 상처를 받았다.
items.title_en: Mosque vandalized in Trois-Rivières
items.title_ko: 트루아리비에르 모스크 기물 파손
items.title_original: Worry, hurt after mosque vandalized in Trois-Rivières, Que.

items.raw_excerpt: Austria’s biggest free outdoor sports initiative returns, with more than 700 classes taking place in parks, public squares and open spaces across the country.
items.summary_en: Austria's largest free outdoor sports program is back this summer. More than 700 classes will take place in parks, public squares, and open spaces across the country.
items.summary_ko: 올여름 오스트리아 최대 규모의 무료 야외 스포츠 프로그램이 다시 열린다. 전국의 공원, 광장, 야외 공간에서 700개가 넘는 수업이 진행된다.
items.title_en: Free Outdoor Fitness Classes Return Across Austria
items.title_ko: 오스트리아 전역에 무료 야외 운동 수업이 돌아온다
items.title_original: How to join free outdoor fitness classes in Austria this summer

items.raw_excerpt: Goa's traditional comunidades fight to save centuries-old communal lands from rapid real estate development, zoning laws, and the erosion of local identity.
items.summary_en: Traditional comunidades in Goa are struggling to protect their communal lands from rapid real estate development. Zoning changes and local identity erosion threaten these ancient shared land systems. Villagers fear losing their heritage to unchecked building.
items.summary_ko: 고아의 전통 공동체 '코무니다지'가 급속한 부동산 개발로부터 공동 소유 토지를 지키기 위해 싸우고 있다. 토지 이용 규제 변화와 지역 정체성 약화가 이 오래된 공동 토지 제도를 위협한다. 주민들은 통제되지 않은 개발로 유산을 잃을까 걱정하고 있다.
items.title_en: Goa villagers fight to save centuries-old communal lands
items.title_ko: 고아 주민들, 수백 년 된 공동 토지 지키기 위해 싸우다
items.title_original: Goa villagers fight to save centuries-old communal lands - ucanews.com

items.raw_excerpt: In mehreren Gemeinden an der gemeinsamen Grenze wurden Anpassungen vorgenommen – die Kantone Aargau und Zürich sind dabei aber gleich gross geblieben.
items.summary_en: Several towns along the Aargau-Zürich border adjusted their boundaries through a land swap. The cantons exchanged small parcels but kept their total area unchanged. The change affects only local administrative borders.
items.summary_ko: 아르가우주와 취리히주 접경에 있는 여러 지자체가 국경 조정을 통해 일부 구역을 맞바꿨다. 두 주는 소규모 토지를 교환했지만 전체 면적은 변함없다. 이번 조정은 지역 행정 경계에만 영향을 미친다.
items.title_en: Aargau and Zürich Swap Small Border Areas
items.title_ko: 아르가우와 취리히, 접경지역 맞교환
items.title_original: Aargau und Zürich tauschen Gebiete ab - Aargauer Zeitung

items.raw_excerpt: Long before Nestory Irankunda's World Cup goal buoyed Australian fans he made his start with Adelaide's Northern Wolves Soccer Club, where he is a hero to many other young players who share a similar background.
items.summary_en: Nestory Irankunda started at Adelaide's Northern Wolves Soccer Club before becoming a Socceroos star. Young players with similar backgrounds now see him as a local hero.
items.summary_ko: 네스토리 이란쿤다는 호주 대표팀 스타가 되기 전 애들레이드의 노던 울브스 축구 클럽에서 축구를 시작했다. 비슷한 배경을 가진 어린 선수들은 이제 그를 지역의 영웅으로 보고 있다.
items.title_en: Grassroots Adelaide club helped Irankunda begin
items.title_ko: 이란쿤다의 출발점이 된 애들레이드 지역 축구 클럽
items.title_original: From refugee to Socceroos star: The grassroots club that gave Irankunda a go

items.raw_excerpt: In Ramasseri near Palakkad, a small group of families continues a long-standing idli-making practice that still draws visitors each morning.
items.summary_en: In Ramasseri near Palakkad, a few families still make idli in a very old local way. Food lovers visit the village each morning to taste it and see the tradition continue.
items.summary_ko: 팔라카드 근처 라마세리에서는 몇몇 가족이 오래된 방식으로 이들리를 만들고 있다. 음식 애호가들은 매일 아침 이 전통 음식을 맛보고 이어지는 장면을 보러 마을을 찾는다.
items.title_en: 200-Year-Old Idli Draws Visitors to a Kerala Village
items.title_ko: 200년 전통 이들리로 손님을 부르는 케랄라 마을
items.title_original: A 200-Year-Old Idli Is Bringing India’s Food Lovers to This Kerala Village - The Better India

items.raw_excerpt: (Kingston, Ontario) The Great Lakes Museum has been recognized as Ontario's Top Small Museum (under 100,000 annual visitors) as part of Attractions Ontario's 2026 Ontario's Choice Awards.
items.summary_en: The Great Lakes Museum in Kingston, Ontario, won Ontario's Top Small Museum award. The award is part of Attractions Ontario's 2026 Ontario's Choice Awards for museums with under 100,000 visitors a year.
items.summary_ko: 캐나다 온타리오주 킹스턴의 그레이트 레이크스 박물관이 온타리오 최고 소형 박물관으로 선정됐다. 이 상은 연간 방문객 10만 명 미만 박물관을 대상으로 하는 Attractions Ontario의 2026 Ontario's Choice Awards 부문이다.
items.title_en: Great Lakes Museum named top small museum in Ontario
items.title_ko: 킹스턴 그레이트 레이크스 박물관, 온타리오 최고 소형 박물관 선정
items.title_original: Great Lakes Museum receives Attractions Ontario’s Top Small Museum award - Kingstonist News

items.raw_excerpt: In this northern Vermont town, residents value strong local connections more than convenience.
items.summary_en: Montgomery is a small town in northern Vermont. Residents say strong local connections matter more than convenience.
items.summary_ko: 버몬트 북부의 작은 마을 몽고메리는 끈끈한 지역 공동체로 설명된다. 주민들은 편리함보다 서로 이어진 이웃 관계를 더 소중하게 여긴다고 말한다.

items.raw_excerpt: In the European Union, 2018 has been designated the year of cultural heritage. Exhibits, conferences and seminars devoted to a new understanding of heritage as a process of discovering history and culture will take place around Europe. The Republic of Moldova also has a newfound appreciation for its heritage, with residents discovering that mammoths and Neanderthals were neighbours of their ancestors and that a Swedish king once lived in a Moldovan village. The past meets the future In the last
items.summary_en: A story looks at Moldova's local heritage. Residents are finding links to mammoths, Neanderthals, and a Swedish king who once lived in a village there.
items.summary_ko: 몰도바 지역의 문화유산을 다룬 이야기다. 주민들은 매머드와 네안데르탈인, 한때 몰도바 마을에 살았던 스웨덴 왕의 흔적을 새롭게 알아가고 있다.
items.title_en: Moldova Finds Stories of Mammoths and a Swedish King
items.title_ko: 몰도바에서 되살아난 매머드와 스웨덴 왕 이야기
items.title_original: Moldova, former home to a Swedish King and motherland of mammoths: how culture helps the regions to develop - EU NEIGHBOURS east

items.summary_en: Antwerp received a $2.3 million state grant for a workforce housing project. The money will help support new housing development in the local area.

items.raw_excerpt: Rimouski is Canada's scenic city in Quebec and a top spot to retire with small-town charm, outdoor fun, and waterfront trails with river views.
items.summary_en: Rimouski is a scenic city in Quebec, Canada. The article says it is a good place to retire, with small-town charm, outdoor activities, and riverfront trails.

items.raw_excerpt: Helsingin seudun ensimmäiseen isoon outlet-tilaan on tulossa 40 muoti- ja lifestyle-liikettä.
items.summary_en: A Norwegian company plans to build a large outlet village along Ring III in the Helsinki area. The site is expected to have 40 fashion and lifestyle stores and aims for two million visitors a year.

items.summary_en: Alver has a threatened landscape type that is slowly disappearing. The area also has an unusual American village on Radøy.

items.raw_excerpt: Cuál es el destino de Córdoba que tiene el lago más limpio de la provincia. Qué hacer en Almafuerte, Córdoba y cómo llegar desde CABA.
items.summary_en: Almafuerte, Córdoba, is described as a hidden spring getaway with the cleanest lake in the province. The article explains what visitors can do there and how to get there from Buenos Aires City.
items.summary_ko: 아르헨티나 코르도바의 알마푸에르테가 주에서 가장 깨끗한 호수를 가진 봄철 숨은 여행지로 소개됐다. 기사에는 현지에서 할 수 있는 일과 부에노스아이레스 시에서 가는 방법이 담겼다.

items.raw_excerpt: Today’s Danish word of the day is one of those words which might cause a chuckle in British English speakers when they hear it for the first time.
items.summary_en: The Danish word 'prik' can make British English speakers chuckle. It sounds like a rude English word but simply means a dot or spot in Danish.
items.summary_ko: 덴마크어 'prik'는 영국인들이 들으면 웃음을 참기 어려운 단어다. 영어의 상스러운 말과 비슷하게 들리지만, 실제로는 '점'이나 '얼룩'을 뜻하는 평범한 단어다.
items.title_en: Danish word of the day: Prik
items.title_ko: 오늘의 덴마크어 단어: Prik
items.title_original: Danish word of the day: Prik

items.raw_excerpt: BauNetz-Architektur-Meldung vom 19.02.2026: Wohnen zwischen Silotürmen / Umbau bei Salzburg von LP architektur - Aktuelle Architekturmeldungen aus dem In- und Ausland, täglich recherchiert von der BauNetz-Redaktion
items.summary_en: LP architektur turned old silo towers into homes near Salzburg, Austria. The project turns industrial buildings into living spaces. BauNetz shares the story of this unusual renovation.
items.summary_ko: LP architektur가 오스트리아 잘츠부르크 근처의 옛 사일로 타워를 주택으로 바꿨다. 산업용 건물을 주거 공간으로 재탄생시킨 프로젝트다. BauNetz가 이 이색적인 리모델링 소식을 전했다.
items.title_en: Living Between Silo Towers: A Renovation Near Salzburg

items.raw_excerpt: Whyalla is the breeding spot for hundreds of thousands of cuttlefish, but the international spectacle has been cancelled after only dozens have been spotted this year.
items.summary_en: Whyalla is usually a breeding place for hundreds of thousands of cuttlefish. This year only dozens have been seen, and experts fear an algal bloom may be the reason.
items.summary_ko: 와이앨라는 보통 수십만 마리의 갑오징어가 번식하는 곳입니다. 올해는 몇십 마리만 관찰돼 행사가 취소됐고, 전문가들은 조류 대발생이 원인일 수 있다고 봅니다.
items.title_en: Whyalla cuttlefish event is cancelled
items.title_ko: 와이앨라 갑오징어 축제 취소
items.title_original: Experts fear algal bloom to blame for disappearance of Whyalla's cuttlefish
